problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
hypothesis: Attention mechanism with linear complexity may resolve What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
